title: Kan Pesum Vaarthaigal Lyrics 7G Rainbow Colony
stanzas:
Kan Pesum Vaarthaigal Lyrics 7g Rainbow Colony
Singer: Karthik
Lyrics Na Muthukumar

Oru mugam
Maraindhaal
Maru mugam theriya
Kannaadi idhayamillai..
Kadal kai moodi
Maraivadhillai ...

Kaattile kaayum nilavai
Kandu kolla yarumillai
Kangalin anumadhi
Vaangi kadhalum
Ingae varuvadhillai.

Dhoorathil
Theriyum velichcham
Paadhaiku sondhamillai
Minnalin oliyai
Pudikkala minmini
Poochikku theriyavillai.

Oru murai
Vazhndhida thindaadudhu
Iru uyir varai
Paaindhu kondadudhu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kan Pesum Vaarthaigal?

The song explores themes of unspoken emotions and longing, capturing the essence of romantic melancholy.

Who is the singer of this song?

Karthik is the singer of Kan Pesum Vaarthaigal.

Who composed the music for 7G Rainbow Colony?

The music for 7G Rainbow Colony was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song reflects the protagonist's inner turmoil and unexpressed feelings towards his love interest.

When was 7G Rainbow Colony released?

The movie 7G Rainbow Colony was released in 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie 7G Rainbow Colony, Kan Pesum Vaarthaigal is a poignant melody that delves into the protagonist's unspoken emotions and longing for his love interest. The song beautifully captures the essence of romantic melancholy, with Karthik's soulful rendition bringing out the depth of Na Muthukumar's lyrics. Yuvan's haunting composition adds to the emotional weight, making it a timeless classic. This song evokes feelings of nostalgia and heartache, resonating with anyone who has experienced unexpressed love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the soulful melody of Kan Pesum Vaarthaigal from the movie 7G Rainbow Colony. Karthik's mesmerizing voice combined with Yuvan's haunting music creates a timeless classic. Dive into the emotional depth of this song that beautifully captures the essence of unspoken words and longing.
stanzaMeanings: The words spoken by the eyes are not understood. The girl I waited for is not kind.
If one face disappears, another face is not visible. The heart is not a mirror. Love does not hide by closing hands.
Even after seeing a hundred wounds, the heart does not forget you.
The pain that comes from a single glance, she does not understand.
Even in dreams and daily thoughts, I am fading away, but my heart does not understand.
No one is here to see the moon burning in the forest. Love does not come here with the permission of the eyes.
The light seen from afar does not belong to the path. The firefly does not understand the lightning's light.
The eyes belong to you, but the sorrows belong to me.
After crossing the shore, only the foam belongs to the shore.
In the world, there are many women, but the heart celebrates only one.
Once it lives, it dances, leaping between two lives.
When the dew drops hit, even the thorn here breaks.
All the lies on earth are wrapped up and made into a woman.
When the storm hits, the tree stands, but the flowers disappear.
Laughter comes, tears come, both are mixed in love.
The pain that comes from a single glance, she does not understand.
Even in dreams and daily thoughts, I am fading away, but my heart does not understand.
Even after the leaves fly in the forest, the branches do not break.
Even after seeing a hundred wounds, the heart does not forget you.
